headline: U.S. commercial insurance rates moderate to 2.9% as market continues to stabilize
summary: Commercial Lines Insurance Pricing Survey: Q4 2025NEW YORK, March 11, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- U.S. commercial insurance rates increased 2.9% in the fourth quarter of 2025, continuing the gradual moderation from the previous two quarters (3.8% in Q2 and Q3 2025), according to the latest findings from WTW's Commercial Lines Insurance Pricing Survey (CLIPS). The survey compares premiums for policies underwritten in a given quarter compared with the same coverage lines in the prior year, providing

headline: AI Disruption Fears Overdone, Says Barclays — Upgrades Arthur J. Gallagher and Willis Towers Watson
summary: Barclays is pushing back against the narrative that artificial intelligence poses an existential threat to insurance brokers, upgrading two of the sector’s largest names while trimming its price target on a third. The bank upgraded Arthur J. Gallagher & Co. (NYSE:AJG) to Overweight from Underweight and Willis Towers Watson PLC (NASDAQ:WTW) to Equal Weight from ... AI Disruption Fears Overdone, Says Barclays — Upgrades Arthur J. Gallagher and Willis Towers Watson

headline: Chubb set as main U.S. insurer for Persian Gulf shipping amid Iran war
summary: The insurance giant will work with the U.S. Development Finance Corporation to help backstop shipping.

headline: Barclays Upgrades Willis Towers Watson to Equal-Weight, Raises Price Target to $341
summary: Barclays  analyst Alex Scott   upgrades Willis Towers Watson (NASDAQ:WTW) from Underweight to Equal-Weight and raises the price target from $318 to $341.
